//                 ISA              Function name                                                    SIMD size       NumArg                                                                                                                            Instructions                                                                                                          IntCost    FltCost     Category                            Flags

+//  Intrinsics for AVX512-BITALG, AVX512-VBMI2, AVX512-VPOPCNTDQ, AVX512-VNNI

//                 ISA              Function name                                                    SIMD size       NumArg                                                                                                                            Instructions                                                                                                          IntCost    FltCost     Category                            Flags
+            // AvxVnni.V512 lifts under AVX512v3, which carries the EVEX-encoded
+            // VPDPBUSD / VPDPWSSD on ZMM. The class-name dispatch in
+            // lookupInstructionSet has already chosen between AVXVNNI and AVX512v3
+            // based on the available CPUID bits, and the caller's downstream
+            // result correctly: on machines without AVX-512 (e.g. Tiger Lake)
+            // AVX512v3 isn't supported and IsSupported returns false.
RELEASE_CONFIG_INTEGER(EnableAVX,                   "EnableAVX",                 1) // Allows AVX and dependent hardware intrinsics to be disabled
RELEASE_CONFIG_INTEGER(EnableAVX2,                  "EnableAVX2",                1) // Allows AVX2, BMI1, BMI2, F16C, FMA, LZCNT, MOVBE and dependent hardware intrinsics to be disabled

public static Vector256<int> MultiplyWideningAndAddSaturate(Vector256<int> addend, Vector256<short> left, Vector256<short> right) { throw new PlatformNotSupportedException(); }
+        /// <summary>Provides access to the x86 AVX-512-VNNI hardware instructions, that operate on 512-bit vectors, via intrinsics.</summary>

+            public static Vector512<int> MultiplyWideningAndAddSaturate(Vector512<int> addend, Vector512<byte> left, Vector512<sbyte> right) { throw new PlatformNotSupportedException(); }
+            public static Vector512<int> MultiplyWideningAndAddSaturate(Vector512<int> addend, Vector512<short> left, Vector512<short> right) { throw new PlatformNotSupportedException(); }
public static Vector256<int> MultiplyWideningAndAddSaturate(Vector256<int> addend, Vector256<short> left, Vector256<short> right) => MultiplyWideningAndAddSaturate(addend, left, right);
